assertions.assertion: Program.cs removes or replaces at least one static AddOpenIdConnect registration with dynamic provider configuration
assertions.rationale: The response removes both the static AddGoogle and AddOpenIdConnect('EntraId') registrations (lines 93-94 comment, line 97 shows bare AddAuthentication). Dynamic providers are loaded from the ConfigurationDbContext instead.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs or a seed file creates an OidcProvider with Scheme set to 'demoidsrv' and Authority set to 'https://demo.duendesoftware.com'
assertions.rationale: Lines 129-135 show `new OidcProvider { Scheme = "demoidsrv", Authority = "https://demo.duendesoftware.com", ClientId = "login" }` in the seed data.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStoreCache() for caching dynamic provider lookups
assertions.rationale: Line 29 shows `.AddConfigurationStoreCache()` chained on the builder.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions or acknowledges that dynamic identity providers require the Enterprise Edition
assertions.rationale: Line 3 states 'This feature requires the Duende IdentityServer Enterprise Edition' and line 156 reiterates this.
